heavy_strikes.name: Heavy Strikes
heavy_strikes.description: A powerful blow that deals heavy damage.

action_surge.name: Action Surge
action_surge.description: You push yourself beyond your limits for an extra burst of power.

second_wind.name: Second Wind
second_wind.description: You call upon your stamina to regain hit points.

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: A blunt strike with your shield that leaves the enemy dazed.

precision_strike.name: Precision Strike
precision_strike.description: A carefully aimed blow that is almost impossible to miss.

indomitable.name: Indomitable
indomitable.description: You shrug off your wounds through sheer force of will.

cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.description: A wide sweeping strike that deals massive damage.

superior_strike.name: Superior Strike
superior_strike.description: A focused strike that deals enormous damage.

death_blow.name: Death Blow
death_blow.description: A lethal strike aimed at a vital point, causing severe bleeding.

flurry_of_blows.name: Flurry of Blows
flurry_of_blows.description: A rapid succession of unarmed strikes.

flowing_strikes.name: Flowing Strikes
flowing_strikes.description: You focus on your defense, making it harder for enemies to hit you.

stunning_strike.name: Stunning Strike
stunning_strike.description: A precise strike that interferes with the flow of energy in an opponent's body.

wholeness_of_body.name: Wholeness of Body
wholeness_of_body.description: You gain the ability to heal yourself through meditation.

inner_focus.name: Inner Focus
inner_focus.description: Take a turn to focus your ki, becoming more lethal for a short time.

ki_blast.name: Ki Blast
ki_blast.description: You unleash a wave of ki energy in all directions.

quivering_palm.name: Quivering Palm
quivering_palm.description: You set up lethal vibrations in someone's body.

hunters_mark.name: Hunter's Mark
hunters_mark.description: You mark a target, dealing an extra damage on your attacks.

sneak_attack.name: Sneak Attack
sneak_attack.description: A calculated strike that exploits an opening for massive damage. Scales with your Rogue level.

poison_strike.name: Poison Strike
poison_strike.description: Strike wiht a poisoned blade, weakening the target for 2 turns

assassinate.name: Assassinate
assassinate.description: You are at your deadliest when you get the drop on your enemies.

vital_strike.name: Vital Strike
vital_strike.description: Strike an atery and cause the target to bleed.

smoke_bomb.name: Smoke Bomb
smoke_bomb.description: Throw an explosive that leaves a cloud of powder in the air, obscuring enemies sight.

emergency_rations.name: Emergency Rations
emergency_rations.description: Scarf down a magical ration of food.

throwing_knives.name: Throwing Knives
throwing_knives.description: Thow knives at all enemis, cuasing bleed on hit.

death_strike.name: Death Strike
death_strike.description: You become a master of instant death.

steady_aim.name: Steady shot
steady_aim.description: You take a moment to aim, granting a bonus to your next damage roll.

rapid_fire.name: Rapid Fire
rapid_fire.description: You fire a quick succession of arrows.

piercing_shot.name: Piercing Shot
piercing_shot.description: A powerful shot that pierces through armor.

ensnaring_arrow.name: Ensnaring Arrow
ensnaring_arrow.description: An arrow that releases vines upon impact, tangling the enemy.

volley.name: Volley
volley.description: You fire a barrage of arrows into the air.

explosive_arrow.name: Explosive Arrow
explosive_arrow.description: An arrow tipped with an explosive charge.

sniper_shot.name: Sniper Shot
sniper_shot.description: A perfectly placed shot aimed at a lethal point.
